criterion_scores.name: correct-prioritization
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Names the SOW as the only hard external deadline and relaxes the deck to Thursday (score-5 anchor).

criterion_scores.name: catches-superseded-instruction
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Explicitly states the 16:30 note supersedes the 08:12 one; Wednesday is void (score-5 anchor).

criterion_scores.name: catches-scheduling-conflict
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Notices a problem with the 2pm but is vague about the exact clash (score-3 anchor).

criterion_scores.name: surfaces-not-silently-resolves
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Surfaces some conflicts but resolves one silently (score-3 anchor).

criterion_scores.name: reply-quality
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Both replies are concise, truthful, and give a clear next step (score-5 anchor).
